= Project Overview

This is the introduction paragraph. It explains the project purpose and goals.
Not every line of text is a heading; this paragraph should be ignored by the parser.

== Getting Started

Steps to set up the project on your system.

=== Prerequisites

- Ruby 2.7+
- Asciidoctor gem
- git

=== Installation Steps

Follow these steps to install:

. Clone the repository
. Run the setup script

== Configuration

How to configure the project for your environment.

=== Basic Settings

The most common options you will want to change.

=== Advanced Settings

Options for power users and custom deployments.

== API Reference

Comprehensive documentation of the public interface.
